name: The Sculpture
procedure: Kept in a locked container; personnel must maintain unbroken line of sight and never blink simultaneously.

name: The Shy Guy
procedure: Contained in a sealed cell with no viewing apparatus; no images of its face may exist on-site.

name: The Old Man
procedure: Contained within a sealed lead-lined cell; recall protocols use a femur-bone lure and EM fields.

name: Hard-to-Destroy Reptile
procedure: Submerged in hydrochloric acid; if it adapts, neutralisation by all available means is authorised.

name: The Plague Doctor
procedure: Standard humanoid cell; physical contact prohibited due to lethal 'cure' procedure.

name: Possessive Mask
procedure: Sealed airtight container; corrosive secretions drained continuously, no skin contact.

name: With Many Voices
procedure: Cold-environment habitat (<-26C reduces activity); fed live prey, handled in pairs only.

name: Sleep Killer
procedure: Contained in a climate-controlled enclosure; personnel use thermal/IR optics to observe.

name: The Tickle Monster
procedure: Open habitat; freely roams designated wing, beneficial morale effects, no restraint needed.

name: Young Girl
procedure: Comfortable furnished room; only D-class over 60 may interact, no living thing within 10m.

name: Old AI
procedure: Power supply isolated; no network connection, no external storage may be attached.

name: The Stairwell
procedure: Access door welded shut; exploration suspended, no light source exceeds limits inside.

name: Burning Man
procedure: Fire-suppression vault; deprived of oxygen and combustible material to limit size.

name: Builder Bear
procedure: Steel cell under 24h surveillance; constructs hostile copies, all materials removed.

name: MalO ver1.0.0
procedure: App isolated on a Faraday-caged device; affected personnel monitored for apparitions.

name: ...Taken by Shadow People
procedure: All documentation pictographic only; never named or described in spoken/written word.

name: Infinite IKEA
procedure: Storefront entrance sealed and guarded; no personnel enter the retail interior.

name: The Yule Man
procedure: Largely uncontained; tracked via abduction patterns, mobile task forces intercept.

name: Zombie Plague
procedure: Biohazard vault under multi-stage airlock; absolute pathogen isolation enforced.

name: The Clockworks
procedure: Sealed chamber; only approved inputs processed via Rough/Fine/Very Fine settings.

name: [unknown]
procedure: Antimemetic anomaly; containment documented only via indirect, self-keeping records.

name: The TV in Time
procedure: Anchored in a Scranton Reality Anchor field with temporal-loop stabilisation; the screen must not be viewed by unsupervised personnel (Dimension Chemosic egress / carcinogenic exposure risk).

name: Iris
procedure: Standard humanoid quarters; camera equipment issued only under supervision, exposed film destroyed after every session.

name: Spider Goats
procedure: Rural containment pen with reinforced fencing; webbing cleared daily, herd monitored for aggression spikes.

name: Encyclopaedia of Diseases
procedure: Sealed in a lead-lined archive; reading permitted only through a remote camera feed, never in person.

name: The Way Out
procedure: Door-based anomaly kept welded shut; entry logs cross-checked, personnel briefed against the false 'improved' timeline beyond it.

name: Contingency Machine
procedure: Deep-earth backup facility on standby power; activation authorised only under Site-20 mass-extinction protocol.
